title: Australian Flaky Pastry Tomato Tart
description: A savory tart that showcases australian flaky pastry, fresh tomatoes, and a hint of sweetness. Serve as a snack or light lunch.
instructions: Roll out the Australian flaky pastry and place in a tart pan.
Slice the fresh tomatoes and layer them in the pastry shell.
Drizzle the soup over the tomatoes.
Sprinkle chopped fresh basil over the top.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
